positive: photorealistic rendering of a futuristic cityscape at night with sleek skyscrapers, neon lights, and a full moon hanging low in the sky, using advanced lighting techniques and high-poly geometry, detailed building textures, and a dynamic color palette
negative: low resolution, pixelated, blurry, washed out, over-filtered, unnatural lighting, poorly textured buildings, and an overly simplistic composition that lacks depth
